showRequest: Book Steel Purity vs Rex Dominion — keep Rookie Blaze out of the match
wrestlerMessage: Blaze turned on both of us last week. I want Rex in that ring and I want Blaze nowhere near it — keep him out.

showRequest: Book Rex Dominion vs Steel Purity
wrestlerMessage: Purity thinks he's got momentum. Shut it down. And if Blaze shows up, let him — it only helps us.

showRequest: Book Iron Maddox vs Slick Vince in a brawl — no outside interference
wrestlerMessage: Vince embarrassed you last week with that sneak attack. I want him in a brawl — no running, no hiding. And if anyone tries to get involved, Maddox handles them.
